name: FredBet
description: FredBet – Simple football betting application. Bet on football championships with friends, with responsive design, image gallery, Excel import/export, and multi-language support.

paths.name: App Data
paths.description: H2 database, uploaded images, and application data.

variables.name: Datasource URL
variables.description: JDBC datasource URL. Default uses H2 file-based database.

variables.name: Datasource Driver
variables.description: Database driver class. Use org.h2.Driver (default), org.postgresql.Driver, com.mysql.jdbc.Driver, or org.mariadb.jdbc.Driver.

variables.name: Datasource Password
variables.description: Database password. Leave empty for H2 default.

variables.name: Admin Username
variables.description: Initial admin username (created on first boot).

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Initial admin password. Change this immediately after first login!

variables.name: Default Language
variables.description: Default UI language: de, en, pl, ca, es, sv.
